case_title: GRELLAS SHAH LLP VS. SYNKRINO BIOTHERAPEUTICS, INC.

REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 78574654) FILED BY PETITIONER GRELLAS SHAH LLP

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER GRELLAS SHAH LLP'S UNOPPOSED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE PETITION TO CONFIRM THE ARBITRATOR'S AWARD IS GRANTED AND THE 4/21/2025 ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONFIRMED IN ITS ENTIRETY. (CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1286.) JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED CONSISTENT WITH THE 4/21/2025 AWARD. (CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1287.4.) A PROPOSED ORDER AND PROPOSED JUDGMENT ARE SUBMITTED FOR THE COURT'S REVIEW. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER GRELLAS SHAH LLP RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT SYNKRINO BIOTHERAPEUTICS, INC. $15,542.01 PRINCIPAL, $1,118.36 INTEREST, $2,925.00 AAA - ADMIN FEES $925, ARBITRATOR COMP - $2000, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,585.37, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT ON ARBITRATION AWARD

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner Grellas Shah LLP's unopposed Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the Petition to Confirm the Arbitrator's Award is granted and the 4/21/2025 Arbitration Award is confirmed in its entirety. (Code of Civil Procedure section 1286.) Judgment shall be entered consistent with the 4/21/2025 Award. (Code of Civil Procedure section 1287.4.)

A proposed order and proposed judgment are submitted for the court's review.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
